bench_setup.notes: SPI loopback: SPI2 master sends {0xA5, 0x5A, 0xF0, 0x0F} on PB15 (MOSI, AF5), echoes back on PB14 (MISO, AF5). PB13=SCK (no loopback needed). 8-bit mode 0, /256 divider (~62 kHz at 16 MHz HSI). PASS after all 4 bytes matched. detail0 = matched count (0→4, then increments). FAIL: error_code 0x1x=timeout on byte x, 0x2x=mismatch on byte x (detail0=received byte).

peripheral_signals.notes: SPI2 MOSI, AF5. Wire: PB15 → PB14.
SPI2 MISO, AF5. Wire: PB15 → PB14.
SPI2 SCK, AF5. No loopback needed — output only.
